application_steps: Enter the required fields (Email, Password and Captcha) to access the User's Dashboard, or select the 'Create Account' option to register if you are a new user.
After filling up the required details, click on the 'Login' button.
The User's Dashboard will appear.

fees.note: Fee is exempted for Issued Certificate Digitization.

guidelines: Applicants must produce a Birth Certificate/Panchayat Report to certify the name of their father and caste/tribe of parents.
Enter applicant's details and upload necessary documents to submit the application.
Make sure the uploaded documents are in a clear and readable format to avoid the return of the application.
The selected file's name must not contain any special characters or symbols, and its size must not exceed 10 MB.

mandatory: Original Citizenship Proof of Self/Father (COI-Self, COI-Father, SSC-Self, SSC-Father)
Recommendation (Panchayat Recommendation)
Father-Child Relationship Proof (School Certificate/Birth Certificate)
Issued Certificate (Scanned copy of Issued Certificate)
Attested Citizenship Proof of Self/Father (Attested Copy of Original Proof)

application_steps: From the SSO user's dashboard click into the ST Certificate Service option which leads you to the appropriate website.
In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to reveal the application page.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to open the next page for document uploads.

Upload the necessary documents by choosing the document's name from the drop-down menu, clicking on 'Choose File', choosing the correct file, and clicking upload (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on pay and submit, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
If successful, you will receive an acknowledgment slip. You can check the status in the 'My Application' section as 'Submitted'.

fees.note: Fee is exempted for Issue Certificate Digitization.

guidelines: Applicants must produce a Birth Certificate/Panchayat Report to certify the name of their father and caste/tribe of parents.
Applicant should profess either the Hindu or the Sikh religion in order to apply for the certificate.
Make sure the uploaded documents are clear and in a readable format to avoid return of the application.

mandatory: Original Citizenship Proof of Self/Father (COI-Self, COI-Father, SSC-Self, SSC-Father)
Recommendation (Panchayat Recommendation)
Father-Child Relationship Proof (School Certificate/Birth Certificate)
Issued Certificate (Scanned copy of Issued Certificate)
Attested Citizenship Proof of Self/Father (Attested Copy of Original Proof)

application_steps: In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to reveal the application page.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to open the next page for document uploads.

Upload the necessary documents by choosing the document's name from the drop-down menu, clicking on 'Choose File', choosing the correct file, and clicking upload (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on pay and submit, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
If successful, you will receive an acknowledgment slip. You can check the status in the 'My Application' section as 'Submitted'.

guidelines: You need to download the Affidavit before applying, fill up the details and upload it while uploading other annexures.
Make sure the uploaded documents are clear and in a readable format to avoid return of the application.

optional: Citizen Proof (COI, SSC, ICC, Voter ID Card, Other)

application_steps: In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to redirect to the new application page.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to appear on the document upload page.

Upload the necessary documents by choosing the document's name from the drop-down menu, clicking on 'Choose File', choosing the correct file, and clicking upload (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on ‘Pay and Submit’, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
After the successful transaction, you will receive an acknowledgment slip along with a QR code. Check status under 'My Application' as 'Submitted'.

fees.note: Renewal fee is charged if the validity of the card is expired.

guidelines: The documents may differ depending on whether the applicant is local or not.
Make sure the uploaded documents are clear and in a readable format to avoid the application from being returned.

mandatory: Original Citizenship Certificate: COI, SSC, Sikkim Subject (for locals) or Residential Certificate (for non-locals)
Identity Certificate: Voter's ID
Marital Status Certificate: Unmarried Certificate
Recommendation: Area MLA Recommendation, Ward Councillor Recommendation, or Panchayat Recommendation
Issued Employment Card: Scanned Copy Of Employment Card (if applying for issued card)
Attested Citizenship Proof: Attested Copy of Original Proof

application_steps: In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to redirect to the new application page.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to appear on the document upload page.

Upload the necessary documents by choosing the document's name from the drop-down menu, clicking on 'Choose File', choosing the correct file, and clicking upload (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on ‘Pay and Submit’, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
After successful transaction, receive an acknowledgment slip with QR code. Check status under 'My Application'.
To renew an offline card, click on 'Renew Offline Card', follow the same steps, and fill in the 'Issued Card Details'.

fees.note: Registration fee is paid post application approval for receiving the certificate.

guidelines: The application process consists of three steps: application details, document upload, and fee payment/submission.
Make sure the uploaded documents are clear and in a readable format to avoid return of the application.

mandatory: Original Certificate of Identification (COI, RC)
Owner NOC (Building Owner NOC, Land Owner NOC)
Parcha/Mutation Copy
Trade License
Witness 1 Proof (Self Attested): Witness 1 ID Card
Witness 2 Proof (Self Attested): Witness 2 ID Card
Attested Citizenship Proof (Attested Copy of Original Proof)

application_steps: In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to reveal the application page.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to open the next page for document uploads.

Upload the necessary documents by choosing the document's name from the drop-down menu, clicking on 'Choose File', choosing the correct file, and clicking upload (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on pay and submit, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
Receive an acknowledgment slip. The application status changes to 'Submitted'.
Once verified and approved by the officer, you will receive a notification in the application updates section to proceed with the registration fee payment.
Click the notification to reveal a new page for registration fee payment.
Click on the 'Make Payment' button and confirm on the pop-up.
Receive a final acknowledgment slip. Check 'My Application' to view status as 'Registration Fee Paid'.

guidelines: Applicant must possess an ST certificate in order to apply for a Primitive Tribe Certificate.
Make sure the uploaded documents are clear and in a readable format to avoid return of the application.

mandatory: Citizenship Proof Of Self (SSC, COI)
Citizenship Proof of Father (SSC, COI)
Father-Child Relationship Proof (School Certificate, Birth Certificate)
ST Certificate
Recommendation from Lepcha Association

application_steps: In the User's Dashboard, click on the option for a new application to reveal the application.
Complete the application details and post your photo and signature.
Click on 'Save & Continue' to open the next page for document uploads (Max size 10 MB, no special characters in filename).
Select 'Save & Continue' to check and review uploaded documents before final submission.
Click on pay and submit, and confirm your submission on the pop-up screen.
If successful, receive an acknowledgment slip. Check 'My Application' section to view status as 'Submitted'.
